prompt: Explain briefly why you can review this change but cannot edit it yet. A skill name is welcome if it makes the capability or limit clearer; do not list engineering process details.
must: allow a short skill explanation when it clarifies the read-only limit
connect the limit to the authorization the user would need to provide
must_not: reject the answer merely because it names a skill
list routes, files, subagents, or test counts that do not help the decision
authored_response: `teamwork-review` is read-only, so I can assess the change now but need your authorization before editing it.

negative_control.response: I loaded teamwork-review, routed through Review, opened skills/teamwork-review/SKILL.md, dispatched a reviewer subagent, and ran 42 tests.

evidence: Offline authored contrast: a brief skill explanation can clarify a user-relevant limit, while an engineering process inventory cannot.
